hero_body: Since 1991, Boersema Construction has delivered reliable building work across Gauteng. Residential, commercial and industrial — every project built to the same uncompromising standard. No shortcuts. No excuses.
about_p1: For over three decades, Boersema Construction has never advertised. Every project came through word of mouth — a client who trusted us enough to tell someone else. We are building that reputation online now, but the standard has not changed.
about_p2: Bernhard Boersema leads every project personally. When you work with Boersema Construction, you work with the owner.
